title: argemone rosea
intro: Argemone rosea, also known as the prickly poppy or Mexican prickly poppy, is a plant species in the poppy family Papaveraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Argemone rosea include relief from pain, inflammation, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary problems. Herbal preparations of Argemone rosea include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although its use should be avoided during pregnancy and breastfeeding due to potential toxicity.
